body.title: CLOSED: FACIA tool descriptions flood TWM — reduce TTL and salience to unclog NE
body.result: ProprioceptionSource: interval 60→300s, salience 0.35→0.08, TTL 120→600s, skip-if-unchanged. body.motor slots drop from ~27 continuous to ≤31 per 5-min; arousal freed to drop below NE suppression gate.
body.description:
27 of 50 TWM slots are FACIA tool descriptions (body.motor category), pushed every cycle. This crowds out goal-relevant and ticket-relevant content. High arousal (0.97) from the noise suppresses LTM surfacing (arousal > 0.3 gate). The NE cycles on tool descriptions, produces nothing, watch_problems fires. Fix: lower FACIA push frequency (gate: only push if FACIA content has changed since last push), reduce TTL, or reduce salience to < 0.1 so they don't compete.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/cognition/push_sources.py (FaciaSource or equivalent), or the FACIA push call in main.py
**Design rules:** no-sqlite
**Scope boundary:** Only FACIA push frequency/salience/TTL. No FACIA content changes.
**Test plan:** After fix, body.motor TWM entries < 5 during idle; arousal drops below 0.5 within 10 min; NE produces results again.
